---
title: "Georgia"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev = "ragg_png"
)

# load packages
library(shiny)
library(highcharter)
library(dplyr)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(dplyr)
library(htmltools)
library(reactable)
library(reactablefmtr)
library(htmltools)

# load data
source("prep/00_library.R")
source("prep/01_functions.R")
source("prep/dataframes.R")
```

::: highlight-section
```{r}
htmltools::div(
  style = "display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;",
  div(id = "highlight-text", "The Robina Institute classifies Georgia's prison-sentencing system as highly indeterminate overall.")
)
```
:::

::: narrow-section

<br>

```{r}
# donuts
chart1 <- 
  all_donut_currently_eligible$Georgia %>% 
  hc_chart(width = 250, height = 200) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Currently Eligible<br>for Parole") 

chart2 <- 
  all_donut_future_eligible$Georgia %>% 
  hc_chart(width = 250, height = 200) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Eligible for Parole<br>in the Future") 

chart3 <- 
  all_donut_future_eligible$Georgia %>% 
  hc_chart(width = 250, height = 200) %>%
  hc_title(text = "TBD<br>Finding") 

# combine charts into a single row
# add charts to an HTML div
htmltools::div(
  style = "display:flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center;",
  chart1,
  chart2,
  chart3
)
```
:::

<br><br>

```{r}
# save charts to call in tabsetPanel in next R chunk

###########
# Overview
###########

#####
# Multi-Line Plot
#####

# line chart showing the change in prison pop 
# and the change in releases to parole over time
state_line_pop_released_to_parole <- 
  all_line_pop_released_to_parole$Georgia %>% 
  hc_chart(width = 500, height = 400) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Dynamics of Parole: Trends in Prison Population, Revocations, Parole, and Parole Eligibility") 

# multi-line plot associated reactable table
state_table_pop_released_to_parole <- 
  all_ncrp_aps_pop_released_to_parole_by_year %>% 
  filter(state == "Georgia") %>% 
  select(rptyear, 
         yearendpop,
         incarcerated_from_parole,
         released_to_parole,
         current_count) %>% 
  arrange(desc(rptyear))

state_table_pop_released_to_parole <- 
  reactable(
  state_table_pop_released_to_parole,
  filterable = TRUE,
  style = hc_reactable_style,
  theme = hc_reactable_theme,
  defaultColDef = colDef(minWidth = 100, align = "left"),
  compact = TRUE,
  fullWidth = FALSE,
  columns = list(
    yearendpop               = colDef(name = "Prison Population", 
                                      filterable = FALSE,
                                      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE)),
    incarcerated_from_parole = colDef(name = "Returned to Prison with Revocation", 
                                      filterable = FALSE,
                                      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE)),
    released_to_parole       = colDef(name = "Released from Prison to Parole", 
                                      filterable = FALSE,
                                      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE)),
    current_count            = colDef(name = "Parole Eligible but not Released from Prison", 
                                      filterable = FALSE,
                                      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE)),
    rptyear = colDef(
      name = "Year",
      filterInput = function(values, name) {
        tags$select(
          # Set to undefined to clear the filter
          onchange = sprintf("Reactable.setFilter('year-select', '%s', 
                             event.target.value || undefined)", name),
          # "All" has an empty value to clear the filter, and is the default option
          tags$option(value = "", "All"),
          lapply(unique(values), tags$option),
          "aria-label" = sprintf("Filter %s", name),
          style = "width: 100%; height: 28px;"
        )
      }
    )
  ),
  defaultPageSize = 21,
  elementId = "year-select"
)



#####
# People Released to Parole
#####

people_released_to_parole_race_state <- 
  people_released_to_parole_race %>% 
  dplyr::filter(state == "Georgia") %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(race, prop)

people_released_to_parole_sex_state <- 
  people_released_to_parole_sex %>% 
  dplyr::filter(state == "Georgia") %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(sex, prop)

people_released_to_parole_age_state <- 
  people_released_to_parole_age %>% 
  dplyr::filter(state == "Georgia") %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(agerlse, prop)

# save race table by state
state_parole_profile_race <- 
    reactable(people_released_to_parole_race_state,
              style = hc_reactable_style,
              theme = hc_reactable_theme,
              defaultColDef = colDef(format = colFormat(separators = TRUE),
                                     align = "left"),
              compact = TRUE,
              fullWidth = FALSE,
              columns = list(
                race = colDef(name = "Race",
                              minWidth = 250),
                prop = colDef(align = "right",
                              name = "",
                              minWidth = 100,
                              format = colFormat(percent = TRUE,
                                                 digits = 1))))
# save sex table by state
state_parole_profile_sex <- 
reactable(people_released_to_parole_sex_state,
          style = hc_reactable_style,
          theme = hc_reactable_theme,
          defaultColDef = colDef(format = colFormat(separators = TRUE),
                                 align = "left"),
          compact = TRUE,
          fullWidth = FALSE,
          columns = list(
            sex  = colDef(name = "Gender",
                          minWidth = 250),
            prop = colDef(align = "right",
                          name = "",
                          minWidth = 100,
                          format = colFormat(percent = TRUE,
                                             digits = 1))))
# save age table by state
state_parole_profile_age <-
reactable(people_released_to_parole_age_state,
          style = hc_reactable_style,
          theme = hc_reactable_theme,
          defaultColDef = colDef(format = colFormat(separators = TRUE),
                                 align = "left"),
          compact = TRUE,
          fullWidth = FALSE,
          columns = list(
            agerlse = colDef(name = "Age",
                             minWidth = 250),
            prop = colDef(align = "right",
                          name = "",
                          minWidth = 100,
                          format = colFormat(percent = TRUE,
                                             digits = 1))))


###########
# Parole Eligibility
###########

# save offense pie by state
state_pie_parole_elgibility_offense <- 
  all_pie_parole_elgibility_offense$Georgia %>% 
  hc_chart(width = 75, height = 75) %>% 
  hc_title(text = "Most Serious Sentenced Offense for People Eligible for Parole but not yet Released in 2020")

state_current_ped_2020_offenses <- 
  current_ped_2020_offenses %>% 
  dplyr::filter(state == "Georgia") %>% 
  select(-c(state, 
            yearendpop_ped,
            tooltip,
            chart_label))

state_table_parole_elgibility_offense <- 
    reactable(state_current_ped_2020_offenses,
              style = hc_reactable_style,
              theme = hc_reactable_theme,
              defaultColDef = colDef(format = colFormat(separators = TRUE),
                                     align = "left"),
              compact = TRUE,
              fullWidth = FALSE,
              columns = list(
                chart_label   = colDef(show = FALSE),
                offgeneral    = colDef(name = "Most Serious Sentenced Offense",
                                       minWidth = 200),
                n = colDef(name = "Number of People",
                           minWidth = 100),
                prop   = colDef(name = "Percentage of People Eligible for
                                Parole but not yet Released",
                                minWidth = 175,
                                format = colFormat(percent = TRUE,
                                                   digits = 1))))
  

###########
# Releases from Prison
###########

#####
# Releases Depending on PED
#####

# pie chart
state_pie_released_at_ped <- 
  all_pie_released_at_ped$Georgia %>% 
  hc_chart(width = 75, height = 75) %>% 
  hc_title(text = "Timing of Release by Parole Eligibility in 2020")

# reactable table data under pie chart
df1 <-
  ncrp_released_at_ped %>% 
  filter(state == "Georgia") %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(released_at_ped_status,
         n,
         prop)

# reactable table under pie chart
state_table_released_at_ped <- 
  fnc_reactable_table_3(df1, "released_at_ped_status", 
                        header1 = "Timing of Release", 
                        header2 = "Number of People", 
                        header3 = "Percentage of Prison Population")




#####
# Predicted Probabilities
#####

df1 <- all_pp_by_variable %>%
  filter(state == "Georgia") %>% 
  select(race, pp_by_race) %>%
  distinct()

table_pp_by_race <- 
  reactable(df1,
          style = hc_reactable_style,
          theme = hc_reactable_theme,
          defaultColDef = colDef(format = colFormat(separators = TRUE),
                                 align = "left"),
          compact = TRUE,
          fullWidth = FALSE,
          columns = list(
            race      = colDef(name = "Race/Ethnicity",
                               minWidth = 200),
            pp_by_race = colDef(name = "",
                                minWidth = 175,
                                align = "right",
                                format = colFormat(percent = TRUE,
                                                   digits = 0))))

df1 <- all_pp_by_variable %>%
  filter(state == "Georgia") %>% 
  select(sex, pp_by_sex) %>%
  distinct()

table_pp_by_sex <- 
  reactable(df1,
          style = hc_reactable_style,
          theme = hc_reactable_theme,
          defaultColDef = colDef(format = colFormat(separators = TRUE),
                                 align = "left"),
          compact = TRUE,
          fullWidth = FALSE,
          columns = list(
            sex       = colDef(name = "Gender",
                               minWidth = 200),
            pp_by_sex = colDef(name = "",
                                minWidth = 175,
                                align = "right",
                                format = colFormat(percent = TRUE,
                                                   digits = 0))))

df1 <- all_pp_by_variable %>%
  filter(state == "Georgia") %>% 
  select(offgeneral, pp_by_offgeneral) %>%
  distinct()

table_pp_by_offgeneral <- 
  reactable(df1,
            style = hc_reactable_style,
            theme = hc_reactable_theme,
            defaultColDef = colDef(format = colFormat(separators = TRUE),
                                   align = "left"),
            compact = TRUE,
            fullWidth = FALSE,
            columns = list(
              offgeneral      = colDef(name = "Most Serious Sentenced Offense",
                                       minWidth = 200),
              pp_by_offgeneral = colDef(name = "",
                                        minWidth = 175,
                                        align = "right",
                                        format = colFormat(percent = TRUE,
                                                           digits = 0))))

df1 <- all_pp_by_variable %>%
  filter(state == "Georgia") %>% 
  select(sentlgth, pp_by_sentlgth) %>%
  distinct()

table_pp_by_sentlgth <- 
  reactable(df1,
            style = hc_reactable_style,
            theme = hc_reactable_theme,
            defaultColDef = colDef(format = colFormat(separators = TRUE),
                                   align = "left"),
            compact = TRUE,
            fullWidth = FALSE,
            columns = list(
              sentlgth      = colDef(name = "Maximum Sentence Lenth",
                                     minWidth = 200),
              pp_by_sentlgth = colDef(name = "",
                                      minWidth = 175,
                                      align = "right",
                                      format = colFormat(percent = TRUE,
                                                         digits = 0))))

###########
# Sentencing
###########



###########
# Disparities
###########
```

```{r}
tabsetPanel(
  id = "tabsetpanel",
  
  #####################################
  
  tabPanel("Overview",
           
  #####################################
           
           ############
           # Column 1
           ############
           div(id = "column1",
               div(id = "line-graph", state_line_pop_released_to_parole,
               div(id = "footnote", "Source: NCRP Year End Population (2000-2020), Annual Parole Survey (2000-2018)"), br(),
               state_table_pop_released_to_parole
             ),

           ############
           # Column 2
           ############
             div(id = "column2",
               div(id = "section-title", "Profile of People Released to Parole in 2020"),
               div(id = "reactable-table", state_parole_profile_race, state_parole_profile_sex, state_parole_profile_age),
               div(id = "footnote", "Source: NCRP Releases (2020). Methodology: 
                   Found people with less than sentence length served and released 
                   unconditionally or conditionally. Removed releases labeled as 
                   Other release (including death, transfer, AWOL, escape).")
             )
           )
  ),
  
  #####################################
  
    tabPanel("Parole Eligibility",
             
  #####################################
           
           ############
           # Column 1
           ############
           div(id = "column1",
               div(style = "flex: 0 0 40%;",
               div(id = "pie-graph", state_pie_parole_elgibility_offense), 
               div(id = "footnote", "Source: NCRP Year End Population"), br(),
               div(id = "reactable-table", state_table_parole_elgibility_offense),
               ),

           ############
           # Column 2
           ############
             div(id = "column2",
               div(id = "section-title", "More Info on Parole Eligibility TBD"),
               div(id = "regular-text",
                       "Ideas: ", br(), br(),
                       "Is the PED missing? If so, is the data missing because they aren't 
                       parole eligible or because the data wasn't entered?", br()
                   )
             )
           )
  ),

  #####################################
  
  tabPanel("Releases from Prison",
           
  #####################################  
  
           ############
           # Column 1
           ############
           div(id = "column1",
               div(style = "flex: 0 0 40%;",
               div(id = "pie-graph", state_pie_released_at_ped),
               div(id = "reactable-table", state_table_released_at_ped), 
               div(id = "footnote", "Source: NCRP Releases (2020)"), br(), br(),
               div(id = "section-title", "Predicted Probabilities of Being Released Within 1 Year of Parole Eligibility in 2020"), br(),
               div(id = "reactable-table", 
                   table_pp_by_race,
                   table_pp_by_sex,
                   table_pp_by_offgeneral,
                   table_pp_by_sentlgth),
               div(id = "footnote", "Source: NCRP Year End Population (2020). Methodology:
                   Predicted probabilities are calculated using logistic regression
                   --predicts the probabilities of being released within 1 year
                   based on various predictor variables such as sex, race, admtype,
                   offgeneral, and sentlgth."),
               ),

           ############
           # Column 2
           ############
             div(id = "column2",
               div(id = "section-title", "More Info on Releases from Prison TBD"),
               div(id = "regular-text",
                   "Ideas: ", br(), br(),
                   "Who (demographics and criminal history) is being released
                   at first eligibility?", br(), br(),

                   "How long after eligibility does release occur?", br(), br(),

                   "How does release vary by the person's demographic and
                   criminal history  characteristics?", br(), br(),

                   "What is the mean and median time between parole eligibility
                   and release for all terms, terms with release bfore PED, and
                   terms with release after PED?", br(), br(),

                   "Number/percentage of release types (conditional vs unconditional)
                   from X year to Y year.", br(), br(),

                   "What is the mean and median time between parole eligibility
                   and release for those released after the PED, by maximum
                   sentence length? (When max sentence length is 1) up to 2 years,
                   2) 2 to 5 years, 3) 5 to 10 years, 4) 10 to 15 years, and
                   5) 15 years to less than life)", br(), br(),

                   "From 2000 to 2020, of the people eligible for release in
                   that year who were released after their PED, what percentage
                   are released in one year? Will do this by demographics and
                   criminal history. For example, there will be a trend line
                   for Black, Hispanic, and White individuals showing the
                   number of people released within one year from 2000-2020.", br()
               )
             )
           )
  ),
  
  #####################################
  
  tabPanel("Sentencing/Length of Stay",
           
  #####################################
  
           div(id = "regular-text",
               "Ideas:", br(),br(),
               "The growth or decline of life sentences from X year to Y year 
               (life without parole).", br(), br(),
               "How different is actual time served compared to sentence length 
               pronounced at court?", br(), br(),
               "Length of stay by most serious sentenced offense, maximum sentence 
               length, demographics.", br(), br(),
               "Bar graph showing the proportion of individuals who served at least 10 
               years by demographics and most serious sentenced offense.", br(), br()
           )
  ),
  
  #####################################
  
  tabPanel("Racial/Ethnic Disparities",
           
  #####################################
  
           div(id = "regular-text",
               "Ideas:", br(),br(),
               "This page will show a breakdown of racial/ethnic/gender disparities in 
               parole eligibility, length of stay, maximum sentence length, etc.", br(), br()
           )
  )
)


```
